texts.content:
Westbrook Public Library – Summer Workshop Schedule

All workshops are free and held in the Community Room.

Monday June 12 – Resume Writing 10:00–11:30 AM
Tuesday June 13 – Digital Photography 2:00–4:00 PM
Wednesday June 14 – Poetry Reading 6:30–8:00 PM
Thursday June 15 – Basic Web Design 10:00 AM–12:00 PM
Friday June 16 – Children's Story Hour 10:30–11:30 AM

Registration required. Call 555-0203 to reserve your spot.

questions.stem: Which workshop takes place in the evening?
questions.explanation: Poetry Reading is scheduled from 6:30–8:00 PM, which is the evening.

questions.stem: What must attendees do before coming to a workshop?
questions.explanation: The schedule states 'Registration required. Call 555-0203 to reserve your spot.'

questions.stem: Which workshop would be most appropriate for a parent with a young child?
questions.explanation: Children's Story Hour is the only workshop explicitly for children, held on Friday morning.

texts.content:
INVOICE #10492

From: GreenScape Landscaping
To: David Chen

Service: Monthly lawn maintenance (May)
Date: May 1, 2025

Mowing & edging … $55.00
Weed control … $25.00
Trimming shrubs … $30.00

Total Due: $110.00
Payment terms: Due within 15 days of receipt

Thank you for your business!

questions.stem: What service was the most expensive on this invoice?
questions.explanation: Mowing and edging cost $55.00, the highest amount listed.

questions.stem: When must David Chen pay the invoice?
options: D. By the end of the month
questions.explanation: The invoice states 'Due within 15 days of receipt.'
